name: Pocket Alexandria
tagline: 156-book esoteric digital library — Hermetic texts, alchemy, philosophy, apocrypha, with Flask web reader and viral quote engine
description: Curated library of 156 public domain esoteric and philosophical texts across 10 categories: Sacred Texts, Hermetic/Occult, Philosophy, Psychology, Alchemy, Apocrypha, Eastern Wisdom, Secret Societies, Astrology, Forbidden. Flask web reader with dark theme at localhost:8888. CLI with download, search, browse, read, recommend. Discovery engine scrapes Gutenberg + Sacred-Texts for new books. Viral quote extractor scores passages for TikTok/Instagram shareability using power word density and paradox detection.
content_angles: 156 banned/suppressed/esoteric books in one app — the hidden library
Viral quote engine: scores passages for TikTok shareability
Books they don't want you to read — curated from Gutenberg + Sacred-Texts
Dark theme web reader built for late-night esoteric rabbit holes
